title: Parkio Daily for May 21, 2026
teaser: Disney Jr. show opens May 26 at Hollywood Studios, plus new Tree of Life playset and Smugglers Run updates.

rides.name: Flight of Passage
rides.note: Early morning waits remain lowest before 10am

rides.name: Seven Dwarfs Mine Train
rides.note: First hour of park opening tends to be best

bignews.title: Disney Jr. Mickey Mouse Clubhouse Live debuts May 26
bignews.body: A new live show opens May 26 at Hollywood Studios featuring Mickey, Minnie, and friends helping find missing pals in a musical celebration. The show is housed in a reimagined soundstage inside The Walt Disney Studios courtyard area, which also opens May 26 with an outdoor plaza inspired by the Burbank studio lot.

parkioInsight.text: The new courtyard and show are likely to draw families early in the day. Arriving during the first hour or after 3pm usually offers shorter waits for meet-and-greet characters nearby.

bignews.title: Magic of Disney Animation experience coming late summer
bignews.body: A new family attraction arrives late summer 2026 at Hollywood Studios, featuring interactive drawing classes with Olaf, character meet-and-greets including Mulan and Rapunzel, and a Wonderland-themed indoor playground. The building is topped with Mickey's Sorcerer Hat and houses the updated Animation Academy.

parkioInsight.text: When the experience opens, the drawing classes and playground tend to fill quickly mid-morning. Booking early slots or visiting during dinner hours often yields shorter wait times for character meets.

topstories.title: Tree of Life playset now available for $70
topstories.body: A new interactive playset modeled after Animal Kingdom's Tree of Life is now on sale for $69.99. The toy features lights, jungle sounds, and includes 10 character figures plus nine accessories including a rolling gurney and stethoscope.

parkioInsight.text: Park-exclusive toys like this playset tend to sell fastest at flagship stores. Stopping by Island Mercantile early in the day or late afternoon usually helps avoid checkout lines.

topstories.title: Millennium Falcon adds Mandalorian and Grogu missions
topstories.body: Smugglers Run at Disneyland and Hollywood Studios now features three new missions with The Mandalorian and Grogu, taking guests to Tatooine. The update gives engineer positions more active roles in gameplay and opens today at both parks.

parkioInsight.text: New attraction content usually draws heavier crowds for the first few weeks. Rope drop or the final two hours of park operation tend to offer shorter standby waits for Smugglers Run.

topstories.title: Buzz Lightyear gets updated scoring system at Magic Kingdom
topstories.body: Space Ranger Spin recently received a gameplay refresh that improves target tracking and scoring mechanics. The updates position it as a stronger competitor to Toy Story Mania in overall experience.

parkioInsight.text: Tomorrowland wait times typically spike between 11am and 2pm. Riding Buzz Lightyear within the first 90 minutes of park opening or after 7pm often keeps waits under 15 minutes.

icymi.title: Disney World debuts $399 private PhotoPass sessions
icymi.body: A new pilot program offers 20-minute private photo shoots with PhotoPass photographers at select resorts for $399. Sessions include digital downloads and are now bookable for Grand Floridian, Polynesian, and Contemporary.

icymi.title: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Muppets Easter eggs revealed
icymi.body: Disney released a guide to hidden references inside the rethemed coaster, including nods to MuppetVision and past park appearances. The queue and show scenes feature dozens of callbacks for longtime fans.

icymi.title: Cinderella Castle repaint nearing completion
icymi.body: The castle's multi-month color refresh is almost finished, with new elegant shades and refined details now visible. The project has restored a more regal and tasteful appearance to the Magic Kingdom icon.

spotlight.title: Max and Aydar streetmosphere returns to EPCOT
spotlight.body: One of the park's most beloved live entertainment acts is performing regularly in World Showcase. The duo's improv comedy and audience interaction make them a standout addition to EPCOT's daily lineup, often appearing near the America pavilion.

parkioInsight.text: Streetmosphere performances tend to draw small crowds that linger for 10-15 minutes. Catching the show during mid-afternoon often means easier viewing spots and a relaxed break from attraction lines.
